name: Mrs. Fields Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, sugar, and brown sugar in a blender until creamy.
2. Add eggs and vanilla; blend well.
3. Gradually add flour, oatmeal, salt, baking powder, and baking soda to the mixture.
4. Stir in chocolate chips (melted) and chopped nuts (optional).
5. Drop dough by golf ball-sized spoonfuls onto an ungreased cookie sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
6. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
